message:
refactor(compaction): extract collect_text_blocks helper, fix token estimate comments

Extract `collect_text_blocks` to deduplicate the pattern of iterating
ContentBlock slices, filtering for Text variants, and joining with
newlines. Replace two identical `filter_map` + `collect` + `join` chains
in `generate_summary` and `generate_turn_prefix_summary` with the new
helper, reducing code duplication and intermediate allocations.

Update inline comments in test_find_cut_point_with_large_tool_result to
reflect the corrected chars-per-token ratio (~3 instead of ~4), aligning
the documented token arithmetic with CHARS_PER_TOKEN_ESTIMATE.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
